message: Morning, team! Anyone else need a triple espresso today?
You're not the only one, Bez! The reports from last week are still giving me nightmares.
Tell me about it, Tinus.
But hey, at least it's sunny outside today. :sunrise:
True, a little sunshine makes everything better.
Also, I'm having my usual green smoothie. That's my secret energy booster.
Nice, Bez! I'll stick with my coffee though.
Anyone else excited for the launch of the new BitCoin :coin: payment feature this week?
Absolutely, Daniel! Been looking forward to it.
By the way, no spoilers, but did anyone catch the football game? Epic comeback!
I missed it! I was knee deep in a sci-fi novel. Anyone else into that?
Oh, I love sci-fi! Can you share the name of the book, Shay?
I've been reading a bit of sci-fi myself.
Looking forward to sharing recommendations, Shay!
There's always so much happening outside of work! Keep the energy :battery: going, team.
It's going to be another productive day. :raised_hands:

Welcome to The Chain, the responsibility is on you to size up the problem.

? *Use `/help` at any time for a list of useful links and commands*
 ? *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once you're ready just click start to begin Start button
Clicked Start button
:alarm_clock: - You have 25 minutes to resolve the outage, good luck! You can type `/help` if you need any reminders.
Hey, we're getting reports of customers struggling to make purchases
@here Anyone else seeing this?
Yes, I've noticed the same, @Bob . It seems like an error in the system
Whatever it is, we need to sort it out quickly.
we need to step on it! before the social media backlash is turning into a storm.
Who is handling incidents today? Please size up the issue, this is urgent
Are the reports coming from through any particular region Bob?
:star: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
I'll double check now
i'm seeing a spike of 500 errors as well on our dashboard, Shay have we made any changes this morning?
Looks like the complaints are from the EU only
:star: Use metrics as evidence
:star: Check changes done to the platform
I'll grab those for you now Boss
Thanks for confirming Tanya can you check for any routing issues in the EU?
<https://uptime-labs.atlassian.net/wiki/external/MjMxNGU0ZjU1ZTVhNDA0NWJmY2M1NjU1OGFiMGY2YjA>
:star: Manage actions and timings
I'll check now
SEV-2 Customers within the EU are reporting issues when attempting to make payments on the site, we've investigating now
*Incident Number INC100034:* SEV-2 Customers within the EU are reporting issues when attempting to make payments on the site, we've investigating now
:star: Incident record created
:star: Send first comms in first 5 minutes
:star: Qualify the problem
Everything's fine from a platforms perspective
Bob Anything similar in how the customers are trying to pay that you're seeing?
The UK is one of our biggest regions and we're getting a lot of complaints
I can try and gather what payment method they we're using
Bob please do and let me know asap. thank you!
:star: Track actions and time box them
Oh no, users are saying they can no longer access the site
I'm getting the same, sounds like we've got a change causing issues
:star: Reproduces the incident
:star: Form a working theory
I'll need to take a moment to analyse the payment card trends
Shay can you take a look at CHG89779 to see if this could be causing any issues?
:star: Reviewed changes
Tanya can you have a look into CHG89778 at the same time for me?
You want me to check Daniel's change?
Sorry, thought that was yours
Yes no problem
Daniel can you have a look into CHG89779 to see if anything might be causing the the site not to load?
Sure thing
I have some info you may find useful
UPDATE: SEV-1 The site is currently not loading for multiple customers at this time, we are investigating the cause and will provide an update in five minutes
:star: Formally assign criticality level to the incident
Let me know what you've worked out bob!
Looks like user paying with bitcoin reported issues first, then all other types of payment methods, then the entire site is inaccessible to the region
Perfect, thanks bob
My change I deployed is not looking to healthy, I can get it rolled back
Bob please keep letting customers know that we're investigating the issue and hope to resolve this shorlty
:star: Know your team and their roles
I see lots of errors in the logs related to payments
Of course!
Daniel Yes please, it sounds like something's gone wrong with payments here
Can you let me know once that's rolled back and we'll check the site to see if that's helped
Understood, I'll proceed with rolling back the payment service
payment service rollback is complete
This is not good. Something is broken after the payment rollback
Thanks, that doesn't look to have made a difference at this time
Hamed what are you seeing?
The error i'm getting indicates the issue might be with the cart
We can try restarting the cart service, I can see the pod for it is down
Tanya how are you getting on with reviewing your change? Could we roll it back if it's looking like it's not working as expected?
:star: Restoration over root cause analysis
I have users reporting globally of inability to access the site
Hamed can you give that a shot? We'll see if that brings things back online
Sorry, I got distracted with Daniels rollback, my change is depended on Daniels, typically when we update payments we have to update Cart redis
I'll restart it
Thanks Daniel
sure @Jack Norris, restarting the cart service
I will have to restart frontend to pick up new service endpoints.
How long will that take?
the service restart is completed
there's so much happening, I wonder what's even broken
okay, the error had changed on my end, seems we've got some of the services up and running at least
I can make payments now, is the incident resolved?
should I inform the customers?
I'm still seeing an issue on my end. How is the site for others here?
Hey @Jack Norris the cart service is crashing again.
I'm not sure what the problem is.
It was up for a second though
UPDATE: We're continuing to work on restoring the site after rolling back some previous changes that were made
I think we need to get CHG89777 and CHG89778 rolled back as well, the Cart service is unhappy
Reports are rising
Daniel and Tanya can you work together to get both of these rolled back at this time? We can then review this further
I need this done in the next 3-4 minutes please
Yes Boss
We can get this restored!
Rollbacks are completed
That's the name of the game. We'll have to try Bitcoin at a later date
Great, i've also restarted the frontend so the website should be working now
Bob How. are the customer reports now, still coming through?
:star: Cross check resolution with stakeholders
@Jack Norris can you confirm?
The reports are going down!
We have site access
Wonderful, sounds like we've made it through
It appears that everything has returned to its normal state
I was worried for a bit but everything looks good now.
Great work, everyone! The payments issue has been resolved and customers can now check out smoothly
Let's group up later and work out what was wrong in the Carts
Phew! Glad we got that sorted. Fantastic teamwork!
Absolutely! Proud to be a part of this team
Thank you @Jack Norris for coordinating the rollback effectively
Brilliant job, team and @Jack Norris!
I've been monitoring the financial metrics, and they're already improving
UPDATE: Customers are now able to access the site and make payments as expected once more.
:star: Confirm resolution with the business
Fantastic work all
